description_long: This is a tall, tapered disposable cup with a white exterior and a blue interior, commonly used for serving hot beverages. The cup features the iconic green Starbucks logo with the siren on one side, and printed checkboxes for drink customization and branding text on the other. The rim is slightly flared, providing a comfortable lip for drinking. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of coated paper cups designed to resist moisture. There is no visible handle or lid, and the cup is open at the top. The branding and text are clearly printed, making it easily recognizable in urban environments.
description: A tall, white disposable cup with a blue interior, Starbucks logo, and printed customization checkboxes. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with no handle or lid.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's white exterior with printed checkboxes and some branding text, but the logo is not fully visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the cup with the upper portion of the green Starbucks siren logo partially visible.
description_view_2: This view displays the main portion of the green Starbucks logo, making the branding most prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the full set of printed checkboxes, the word 'STARBUCKS', and some cautionary text near the base.
